name: Coramitug
summary: Humanized monoclonal antibody targeting misfolded transthyretin, tested as a cardiac amyloid-depleting approach in ATTR-CM.
mechanism_summary: Targets misfolded and aggregated TTR and is designed to promote clearance of existing transthyretin amyloid through antibody-mediated phagocytosis.

open_questions: Whether NT-proBNP and echocardiographic signals translate into walking, hospitalization, or mortality benefits
Whether amyloid-depleting antibodies can reverse established cardiac dysfunction
